title: DDL Notifier: Incorrect time value: '{1970 1 1 0 0 1 0}
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
drop table if exists tdv;
create table tdv(a int);
ALTER TABLE tdv ADD COLUMN ts timestamp DEFAULT '1970-01-01 08:00:01';
drop table if exists tdv;
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

DDL Notifier has no errors.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

It print out this error: `Incorrect time value: '{1970 1 1 0 0 1 0}`

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

master
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT '1970-01-01 08:00:01');
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT '1970-01-01 08:00:01';
INSERT INTO test_table(id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test User');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE with default timestamp value '1970-01-01'
